prompt_text:
### Demographics: 62-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 1 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia; Occasional GI side effects (nausea/loose stool)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Overweight
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~20 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 71.9 kg; Height 173.2 cm; BMI 24.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 134/75 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.6%; 9 months ago 7.3%; 6 months ago 6.8%; 3 months ago 6.3%; current 5.8%), FPG (12 months ago 181mg/dL; 9 months ago 194mg/dL; 6 months ago 157mg/dL; 3 months ago 158mg/dL; current 121mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 71.8kg; 9 months ago 70.2kg; 6 months ago 69.7kg; 3 months ago 68.7kg; current 71.9kg), Height (12 months ago 173.2cm; 9 months ago 173.2cm; 6 months ago 173.2cm; 3 months ago 173.2cm; current 173.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 23.0kg/m²; current 24.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 137mmHg; 9 months ago 133mmHg; 6 months ago 133mmHg; 3 months ago 139mmHg; current 134mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 77mmHg; 9 months ago 73mmHg; 6 months ago 76mmHg; 3 months ago 76mmHg; current 75mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 42U/L; 9 months ago 35U/L; 6 months ago 34U/L; 3 months ago 37U/L; current 39U/L), AST (12 months ago 38U/L; 9 months ago 30U/L; 6 months ago 35U/L; 3 months ago 28U/L; current 35U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 28mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 30mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 28mL/min/1.73m²; current 27mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 129mg/g; 9 months ago 119mg/g; 6 months ago 88mg/g; 3 months ago 92mg/g; current 120mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 77mg/dL; 9 months ago 79mg/dL; 6 months ago 75mg/dL; 3 months ago 80mg/dL; current 76mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 35mg/dL; 9 months ago 35mg/dL; 6 months ago 36mg/dL; 3 months ago 35mg/dL; current 37mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 139mg/dL; 9 months ago 121mg/dL; 6 months ago 121mg/dL; 3 months ago 137mg/dL; current 132mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.8g/dL; 6 months ago 10.1g/dL; 3 months ago 10.0g/dL; current 9.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
